subsection.heading: In General.—
subsection.content: The Administrator may establish a ground-based analog capability in remote United States locations in order to assist in the development of lunar operations, life support, and in-situ resource utilization experience and capabilities.

subsection.heading: Environmental Characteristics.—
subsection.chapeau: The Administrator shall select locations for the activities described in subsection (a) that—

paragraph.content: have significant temperature extremes and range; and
have access to energy and natural resources (including geothermal, permafrost, volcanic, or other potential resources).

subsection.heading: Involvement of Local Populations and Private Sector Partners.—
subsection.content: In carrying out this section, the Administrator shall involve local populations, academia, and industrial partners as much as possible to ensure that ground-based benefits and applications are encouraged and developed.

text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; border-left:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt; padding-left: 2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid black; padding-left: 2pt;
